description: You are a satellite operations analyst investigating a recent thermal anomaly on the INST satellite. A sudden temperature spike was detected and the automatic safing limits triggered. The flight director has requested a formal post-event analysis. Using the time window and emergency temperature threshold provided in /home/ga/Desktop/anomaly_window.json, analyze the historical telemetry for the specified target. Determine the highest peak temperature reached during that window and the number of telemetry samples that strictly exceeded the threshold. Record your findings in /home/ga/Desktop/anomaly_investigation.json using the keys 'investigation_target', 'peak_temperature', and 'samples_above_threshold'. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
